metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_3973
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure S1: Subcellular fractionation data from rat brain indicates that RAP2A is present in the PSD fraction.
11/01/2021 Dnyanada: RAP2A distribution is not limited to the PSD fraction but is also present in the synaptosomal (P2B), ER membrane/microsome (P2C), crude synaptic vesicle fraction (CSV) and crude synaptic membrane fraction (CSM). Based on this homogenous pattern of distribution in rat brain subcellular fractions, the generic term "synapse" was chosen.. Experimental description: Subcellular fractionation of rat brains was performed based on published protocols (Huttner et al., 1983; Mizoguchi et al., 1989). Briefly, 10 male Sprague- Dawley rats (200-250 g) were anaesthetized, decapitated, and cortices were isolated in 0.32 M sucrose.
